choices.text: R (Responsible - does the work) + A (Accountable - one final authority) + C (Consulted - input) + I (Informed - in loop). Per task, define who plays each role. Clarifies ownership across stakeholders.

Owner-Architect-Contractor weekly: schedule, cost report, change orders, RFIs (Requests for Information), safety, quality, decisions needed. Documented + signed. Maintains alignment + creates audit trail. Core construction rhythm.

questions.explanation: OAC weekly = project rhythm + audit trail.
